purpose: Contract for converting FastEddy outputs into Wind2D/Beacon Live forecast layers.

u_ms.source: FastEddy u interpolated to display height

v_ms.source: FastEddy v interpolated to display height

w_ms.source: FastEddy w interpolated to display height

confidence.source: data completeness + solver status + interpolation validity

quality_gates: No tile may be published if solver_status is fail.
No tile may be published if display-height u/v interpolation has non-finite values over more than 1% of land/nearshore cells.
Direction must use the same meteorological convention as Wind2D and WindNinja layers.
The manifest must expose the exact AROME run and valid time.
Data tiles must preserve values for live recolorization; color tiles are visualization products only.
